title: Gate the engine's operator-method test targets so cargo test -p fathomdb-engine (default) compiles under the operator gate
resolves: Slice 27 fix-1 codex [P1] (dev/plans/runs/0.8.0-slice-27-review-fix1-20260606T010212Z.md): fix-1's #[cfg(feature=operator)] method gating broke `cargo test -p fathomdb-engine` (default) — engine integration tests call the now-hidden methods; masked by --workspace feature-unification.

commits.summary: design memo — 13 pure-operator test targets (required-features) + 1 mixed (pr2b per-fn cfg); corpus_graph not-operator; RED baseline; no non-test consumer affected
GREEN — 13 [[test]] required-features=[operator] entries in fathomdb-engine/Cargo.toml; per-fn #[cfg(feature=operator)] in pr2b_mean_recompute.rs (4 tests + exclusive helpers/struct/import)
DOC-INDEX — add fix-2 design memo row

findings_addressed: [P1] resolved: `cargo test -p fathomdb-engine` (default) compiles again (RED: no method named dump_schema/.../recompute_mean). No engine method un-gated — the operator gate (and thus the facade method-level recovery-clean guarantee) is unchanged.
Masking root cause addressed: BOTH engine configs are now exercised standalone (default + --features operator), not only via --workspace feature-unification.

tdd_evidence.red_evidence: cargo test -p fathomdb-engine --no-run (default) FAILED: error[E0599] no method named dump_schema/dump_row_counts/dump_profile/rebuild_projections/rebuild_vec0/trace_source_ref/excise_source/truncate_wal/verify_embedder/check_integrity/safe_export/recompute_mean.
tdd_evidence.green_evidence: cargo test -p fathomdb-engine (default): 47 ok-suites, 0 failures; pr2b_mean_recompute runs ONLY topic_pivot_does_not_auto_recompute_mid_ingest (1 test). cargo test -p fathomdb-engine --features operator: 60 ok-suites (the +13 gated targets), 0 failures; pr2b runs all 5. clippy --all-targets -D warnings rc=0 (no dead-code from the per-fn split).

engine_default_test_build: COMPILES (cargo test -p fathomdb-engine --no-run default rc=0); non-operator tests run; 47 ok-suites.

gated_test_targets.not_operator_left_untouched: corpus_graph.rs (only a //! doc-comment mention of trace_source_ref; 0 real calls; compiles on default — review false-positive from an aborted parallel compile)

unchanged_from_fix1: facade gating, governed_surface.rs + method-absence doctests, no_recovery_surface.rs (byte-frozen), rust.md/AC-074, AC-050c rc=0 — all unchanged (no edits to those files).

agent_verify_result.cargo_test_fathomdb_default_and_operator: PASS (governed_surface + method-absence doctests green; operator seam resolves)
agent_verify_result.pyright: 0 errors (31 env warnings; no Python changed)
agent_verify_result.AC_037_netns: environmental blocker only (CI at Slice 40) — not exercised standalone here

next_step_for_orchestrator: Slice 27 fix-2 merged at <merge sha>; re-review codex base 03492e5 (or current main); on PASS close Slice 27. This is the 2nd fix on Slice 27 (orig [P1]→fix-1→fix-1 [P1]→fix-2); a fix-2 [P1] would HALT to HITL per the fix-N bound.
